summary.en: A flagship Blue Ocean Strategy case: Cirque du Soleil escaped the declining traditional circus red ocean by eliminating costly animals and star performers, borrowing from theatre and opera, and creating a premium live-entertainment experience for adults and corporate buyers.
summary.zh: 蓝海战略标志案例：太阳马戏团没有在衰退的传统马戏红海中继续争夺儿童和家庭观众，而是剔除高成本动物与明星演员，借鉴剧场和歌剧，创造面向成人和企业客户的高端现场娱乐。

sources.label: Blue Ocean Strategy · Cirque du Soleil Case Study
Blue Ocean Strategy teaching materials · Cirque du Soleil
Osterwalder & Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Blue Ocean Strategy chapter

headline.en: Blue Ocean Strategy through category reconstruction
headline.zh: 通过重构品类理解蓝海战略

whyOpen.en: Cirque du Soleil shows the four actions clearly: eliminate costly circus conventions, borrow theatre cues, and create a premium adult entertainment category.
whyOpen.zh: 太阳马戏团清楚展示了四步动作：剔除高成本马戏惯例，借鉴剧场元素，创造高端成人娱乐品类。

audience.en: Beginners who need a vivid example of changing the basis of competition.
audience.zh: 适合需要直观看到“改变竞争基础”的新手。

commonMisreads.en: The case is not simply premium circus; it removes parts of circus economics while borrowing from theatre and opera.
commonMisreads.zh: 这个案例不是简单的高端马戏；它去掉了部分马戏经济结构，同时借用剧场和歌剧。

practicePrompts.en: Which expensive industry convention could you remove without reducing the value your target audience truly seeks?
practicePrompts.zh: 哪一个昂贵行业惯例可以被移除，却不降低目标受众真正追求的价值？
